title: Emissive Glowing Ores for Bare Bones
description: Makes ores glow to enhance visibility - Bare Bones edition. (OptiFine/Continuity required)
body:
![Glowing ores in a cave with Bare Bones resource pack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96ef9d13ff283f5732f51da578d238bef931f4eb_0.webp)

**Emissive Glowing Ores** for [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) adds glowing textures to the overworld and nether ores while maintainig the style of Bare Bones. [OptiFine](https://optifine.net) (Forge), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (Fabric, Forge, NeoForge or Quilt) or any other mod that supports emissive textures is required, else nothing will be changed.

Makes the following blocks emissive:
- Iron Ore
- Coal Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Lapis Lazuli Ore
- Gold Ore
- Copper Ore
- Ancient Debris
- Gilded Blackstone
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Nether Gold Ore
